body_txt: A subtrope of Limited Wardrobe . Schools that require their students to wear uniforms are a common sight around the world. Given that Changing Clothes Is a Free Action doesn't apply in Real Life , it's not surprising to see students lounging around malls and shopping centers wearing them, as it shows that they just got out of school. However, there are certain characters out there who, even on their days off, will still choose to forgo their chance to wear casual clothes and instead wear their standard school clothes. A common explanation for this is that the student can't afford any other outfits and only has the uniform to wear, but that is not always the case. Another reason could be an individual's desire to show that they are part of a group. There have even been cases where schools require their students to wear their uniforms even outside of class. Or maybe they're just that damn comfy. Of course, this is sometimes done with Fanservice in mind, since uniforms are very often appealing to fetish . (See also Catholic School Girls Rule , Sailor Fuku .) School uniforms are also a part of the Gyaru Girl (specifically kogal ) fashion style, so characters who wear them all the time may be part of that subculture. During a Beach Episode , the most straight-laced female member of the cast will typically be depicted wearing a school-issue swimsuit rather than a more daring bikini. Of course, there are exceptions to the rule. Can overlap with Transfer Student Uniforms when a student continues to wear their old uniform at a new school that doesn't have one. Compare Non-Uniform Uniform .
